title: Permasnow
body:
![text_logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/810b9b56874fda33a474a0229db926a2ba9ec266.png)

Adds unmeltable cold stuff: **Eternal Snow** and **Eternal Ice**.

### How to obtain
- **Eternal Snow**: right-click a regular **Snow** block with a **Powder Snow Bucket**.
- **Eternal Ice**: right-click a regular **Ice** block with a **Powder Snow Bucket**.

### Features
- **Eternal Snow** and **Eternal Ice** doesn't melt.

Report bugs or give me a feedback on [Github](https://github.com/thebluetropics/permasnow) or [Discord](https://discord.gg/A9hgghDk48).
